title: HSK1 Gate 12 Lesson
explanation: This gate focuses on practical high-frequency words. Learn the key words first, then read the short paragraph and answer comprehension questions.
passage: Gate 12 mini passage: 我们今天学习第12关的新词。先听、再读、再说，用中文介绍自己的一天。

comprehension.question: Who is learning new words in this lesson?
What should you do before speaking?
comprehension.answer: Listen first, then read, then speak.

comprehension.question: What can you introduce in Chinese?

speakingPrompt: Use 2-3 short Chinese sentences to describe your day.
